name: gitlab
description: Inspect and operate GitLab projects, merge requests, issues, pipelines, and discussions from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Triage GitLab MRs, issues, and pipelines
interface.longDescription: Use GitLab from Codex through a local MCP server backed by the GitLab REST API. It supports project discovery, merge request and issue inspection, discussions, CI pipeline lookup, comments, approvals, merge actions, and a raw API escape hatch for unsupported endpoints.
defaultPrompt: Review a GitLab MR and summarize blockers
Check the latest GitLab pipeline failures
